channel.title: Will this work on all plugins
channel.description: Will this work with elementor and various other plugins ?

item.title: Will this work on all plugins
item.dc:creator: rightwingboogy
item.description:
Are you getting pretty good speed with page builders. Any samples available ?

Read full topic
item.source: Will this work on all plugins

item.title: Will this work on all plugins
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @rightwingboogy,

Here you have an answer provided to a similar question

Elementor Plugin Support with Frontity 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Hi @popat.jitendra Pages built with page builders like Elementor , Page Builder by SiteOrigin , CoBlocks and the likes can be fetched into Frontity apps. However, like we do with Gutenberg in frontity.org, you’d need to import the builder’s styles into the Frontity application. In frontity.org, we saved the Gutenberg styles in a folders, imported it and included it with the <Global /> component in Frontity. To use the page builders styles in Frontity, you’d have to copy the css files from the…

Hope this helps

Read full topic
